layers.responsibility: resolve query intent into a read-only retrieval-package over knowledge-core
merge retrieval-package + warnings + prerequisites + continuity-state into an assembly-package
shape assembly-package into a supervised guidance-package per ADAPTIVE precedence
evaluate escalation predicates and produce 12-field escalation packages
load timeline + context vector and persist append-only checkpoint records
host operator review checkpoints, override channel, and supervision receipts

rules: Layers are unidirectional: retrieval → assembly → guidance, with supervision/continuity/escalation as orthogonal observers.
Every layer emits provenance; an unobserved emission invalidates the prototype run.
No layer performs destructive operations during the prototype.
No layer may bypass lifecycle P-tier gates or schema-pin enforcement.
No layer may elevate confidence to compensate for missing inputs.
